2021-22 Duquesne Dukes Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 6-24 (1-16, 14th in A-10 MBB)

Coach: Keith Dambrot

PS/G: 65.2 (316th of 358)

PA/G: 73.4 (288th of 358)

SRS: -6.34 (244th of 358)

SOS: 1.86 (116th of 358)

ORtg: 95.9 (314th of 358)

DRtg: 108.0 (326th of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +50000
